positive: A whimsical, minimalist illustration of a soaring mountain owl perched on a delicate branch, observing a field of glowing bioluminescent flora. The style is a blend of Art Nouveau symmetry and modern vector minimalism, characterized by thick, clean outlines and flat, saturated color blocking. The color palette must be deep twilight blues, emerald greens, and pops of warm gold yellow, giving a nocturnal, ethereal glow. The composition should place the owl centrally, utilizing negative space effectively, making the silhouette distinct and pop against the background. Ideal for a highly detailed, single-color screen print feel. High contrast, clean vector art style, suitable for direct-to-garment apparel printing.
